hook.summary: A fast-paced montage of diverse blocky combat environments emphasizing the game's long history.
hook.visual_action: Rapid cuts between a warehouse map and a toy-themed bedroom map with active shooting.

scene_flow: Montage of warehouse combat with blocky vehicles and shooting.
Transition to a toy-themed bedroom map featuring a large red plane and colorful blocks.
Nighttime urban combat scene with police cars and explosions.
Natural cave environment showing exploration and shooting near water.
Final end card with game title, gameplay on a device, and a 'PLAY' button.
audience_proxy: Male gamers aged 13-25 who enjoy blocky, Minecraft-style aesthetics and fast-paced FPS action.
